title: Mei Dong
html:
The visa contact for Yahir's China year / Shanghai program via CIEE / OSU. First named in 2024 05 13 things as "email mei dong about china visa." Functions in the corpus as the single named bureaucratic node between Yahir's pre-China planning and his actual on-the-ground arrival — the gateway figure.

TL;DR

  • 10 inbound citations — small absolute number, but load-bearing for the entire China chapter logistics.
  • First mention: 2024 05 13 things — visa email todo.
  • Confirms the institutional path: Yahir's China year went through CIEE + OSU's study-abroad infrastructure, not solo-arranged.
  • The completion artifact: 2024 09 16 yahir gonzalez ciee completed — Mei Dong is presumably the CIEE coordinator who signed off.
  • Functions as a named gatekeeper in the corpus — most of the China-chapter prep is Yahir-on-Yahir; Mei Dong is one of the few external named figures.

Key facts

  • CIEE coordinator. Most likely the CIEE Shanghai visa point-of-contact for OSU students.
  • Pre-trip touchpoint. 2024 05 13 things / 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip both list "mei dong" as a todo target.
  • Completion-sign-off. 2024 09 16 yahir gonzalez ciee completed = the post-onboarding artifact.
  • Single-name reference. Yahir doesn't elaborate — Mei Dong is functional, not relational.
  • Cross-references the whole China-chapter scaffolding. shanghai · china · china chapter · shanghai study abroad · ciee · osu all link back here.

Source summaries

  • 2024 05 13 things — first mention
  • 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip — same week, different capture
  • 2024 09 16 yahir gonzalez ciee completed — completion artifact

Plus 7 cross-links from China / Shanghai / CIEE / OSU entity pages and people across multiple projects query.

  • china · shanghai — geographic context
